title: Lesson 451: 左右, 皿, 更に...

items.gloss: (doing) various things; (doing) this and that; being apt to; being prone to; tending to; at any rate; anyhow; anyway; all sorts of (negative things); various; things that do not exist; rabbit horns
plate; dish; platter; disc; serving; helping; course; kanji radical 108 (at the bottom)
furthermore; again; after all; more and more; moreover; even more
to leave; to go away; to pass; to elapse; to be distant; to send away; to drive off; to divorce; to (do) completely; last ... (e.g. "last April")
